prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on molecular oxygen (O₂, 2 atoms) at the DFT level, tier 'standard' → B3LYP/def2-TZVP (PySCF UKS, exact four-centre integrals, no density fitting), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 3 (triplet ground state). Geometry: user-supplied .xyz, used as-is (single-point). SCF converged in 7 cycles. No warnings reported (clean run). Integrity: trustworthy=true, all checks passed.

HOMO energy: −8.8739616 eV (degenerate with HOMO−1)
LUMO energy: −3.5859031 eV (degenerate with LUMO+1)
HOMO–LUMO gap (headline value): 5.2880586 eV
Total energy: −150.38872 Hartree (−4092.2855 eV)

The HOMO/LUMO degeneracy reflects the degenerate π* SOMOs of the triplet O₂ ground state.

CLI: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 3 --stdout json
